SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.cobol

Class IsCobolRuntimeSystem

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.cobol.IsCobolRuntimeSystem
All Implemented Interfaces:
ICobolRuntimeSystem
public class IsCobolRuntimeSystem extends Object implements ICobolRuntimeSystem
An implementation of the ICobolRuntimeSystem interface that interacts with the ISCOBOL runtime system. This class provides methods for initializing the ISCOBOL runtime environment, running COBOL programs, and closing the runtime system.

  • Method Details

    • init

      public void init(Configuration config)
      Initializes the ISCOBOL runtime system with the specified configuration. This method sets the COBPATH system property based on the configuration.
      Specified by:
      init in interface ICobolRuntimeSystem
      Parameters:
      config - The configuration object containing COBPATH settings.

    • run

      public int run(String pgmname, String parm) throws ProgramNotFoundException, InvalidLicenseException
      Runs the specified COBOL program with the given parameters.
      Specified by:
      run in interface ICobolRuntimeSystem
      Parameters:
      pgmname - The name of the COBOL program to run.
      parm - The parameters to pass to the COBOL program.
      Returns:
      The exit code of the COBOL program.
      Throws:
      ProgramNotFoundException - If the specified program is not found in the path.
      InvalidLicenseException

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes the ISCOBOL runtime system.
      Specified by:
      close in interface ICobolRuntimeSystem

    • getRuntimeVersion

      public String getRuntimeVersion()
      Specified by:
      getRuntimeVersion in interface ICobolRuntimeSystem
